basics.name: PRINCE PATEL
basics.title: Cloud, DevOps & Cybersecurity Enthusiast | DevSecOps Engineer
basics.summary: DevOps Engineer with 2+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure, automation, and CI/CD across AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI, and Alibaba Cloud. Strong focus on DevSecOps and cybersecurity, integrating security, IAM, and best practices into automated deployment pipelines. Hands-on experience in cloud cost optimization, monitoring, and reliability, ensuring scalable and secure systems. Passionate about automation, continuous improvement, and building cloud-agnostic, resilient platforms.

bullets: Designed and automated multi-cloud infrastructure using Terraform across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, and Azure DevOps.
Implemented Kubernetes-based deployments using Docker, Helm, and GKE/AKS/EKS.
Integrated monitoring and logging using Prometheus, Grafana, and CloudWatch.
Worked closely with developers to optimize deployment workflows and improve system reliability.
Administered and managed Azure cloud environments, including Microsoft 365 Admin Center and SharePoint Admin Center, ensuring secure access control and operational stability.
Automated cloud infrastructure provisioning and configuration using Terraform and scripting, reducing manual effort and improving deployment consistency.
Implemented containerization using Docker to streamline application deployment and environment standardization.
Optimized AWS cloud services for performance, scalability, and security, following cloud best practices.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams using JIRA to track tasks, manage sprints, and deliver cloud automation initiatives efficiently.

achievements.title: 2+ Years Experience
achievements.context: In cloud infrastructure, automation, and CI/CD across 5 major cloud providers.

achievements.title: Multi-Cloud Mastery
achievements.context: Hands-on experience with AWS, Azure, GCP, OCI, and Alibaba Cloud.

achievements.title: 6 Professional Certifications
achievements.context: Including GCP Associate Cloud Engineer, GCP Professional Cloud DevOps Engineer, and Azure Administrator.

projects.title: FINOMICS – Multi-Cloud Cost Management Platform
projects.stack: AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle Cloud (OCI), Alibaba Cloud, Terraform, Python, Bash, Slack APIs
bullets: Designed secure onboarding workflows using least-privilege IAM across five cloud providers.
Automated cost data ingestion from AWS CUR, Azure Cost Management, GCP Billing, OCI FOCUS Reports, and Alibaba Cloud Cost Explorer.
Built Terraform-based scalable infrastructure to support multi-cloud integrations.
Developed scripts for daily, monthly, and anomaly-based cost analysis with real-time Slack alerts.

projects.title: ARISTOCRAT – Disaster Recovery Architecture (GCP)
projects.stack: Google Cloud Platform, Terraform, Chaos Toolkit, Python
bullets: Designed and implemented multi-region disaster recovery architecture to ensure business continuity.
Built reusable Terraform modules for automated and repeatable DR infrastructure provisioning.
Implemented Chaos Toolkit to simulate failure scenarios and validate system resilience.
Automated backup, failover, and recovery workflows for production readiness.

projects.title: GUNDERSON – Cloud Security & Governance Assessment
projects.stack: AWS, Azure, GCP cloud, Terraform, IAM, Security & Compliance Tools
bullets: Conducted comprehensive cloud security and governance assessments across multi-cloud environments.
Identified gaps in IAM, networking, logging, monitoring, and compliance.
Delivered an actionable remediation roadmap aligned with industry best practices.
Recommended Infrastructure as Code (IaC) adoption for standardized and secure deployments.

projects.title: PRAMA – Multi-Cloud Asset Management Platform
projects.stack: AWS, Azure, GCP, Terraform, Azure DevOps, Kubernetes
bullets: Designed and maintained Terraform modules for infrastructure provisioning across AWS, Azure, and GCP.
Built and managed Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines for automated deployments and updates.
Implemented monitoring and performance optimizations to improve reliability and availability.
Ensured cloud cost efficiency and resource optimization across environments.

projects.title: MGM RESORTS – Cloud Infrastructure Assessment & Automation (GCP)
projects.stack: Google Cloud Platform, Terraform, IAM, Networking, Logging & Monitoring
bullets: Performed a detailed assessment of GCP infrastructure focusing on security, scalability, and cost optimization.
Conducted gap analysis aligned with Cloud Foundations best practices.
Developed Terraform-based automation blueprints for governance and standardized provisioning.
Created a strategic roadmap for secure, scalable, and cost-effective cloud infrastructure evolution.
